# UK Study Tour Website - Project Customization

## Project Overview
UK study tour website homepage featuring Oxford/Cambridge imagery with three main service offerings and consultation features.

## Key Features
- Responsive navigation bar with logo and consultation button
- Hero section with background imagery
- Three service categories (短期游学, 私校插班, 暑期学校)
- Call-to-action consultation button
- Mobile responsive design
- Modern styling with smooth transitions

## Technology Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 with responsive design
- Vanilla JavaScript for interactivity

## File Structure
```
├── index.html          # Main webpage
├── css/
│   └── styles.css      # Styling
├── js/
│   └── script.js       # JavaScript functionality
└── images/             # Image assets (placeholder)
```

## Development Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML5
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Keep CSS modular and organized
- Use vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Chinese language content
- Professional styling suitable for education services
